programmes.show_description: Fantasy sequel with Christopher Lambert. Immortal Connor MacLeod's new-found happiness and settled family life are shattered by the sudden reappearance of his arch-enemy Kane. (1994)
Horror starring Trevor Donovan. On a mission to locate the U.S. president, a rescue team battles an ancient monster in the Bermuda Triangle. (2014)

Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
It's tooth against metal in this sci-fi adventure! After a new mega shark appears, Russia reawakens a giant robot doomsday device, leading to a deadly battle between the two creatures. (2015)

Western remake with Lou Diamond Phillips. A notorious outlaw contemplates changing his ways when he takes shelter with a Quaker family, but must protect them when an old foe hunts him down. (2009)

Gripping action with Richard Burton. British mercenaries hired to free a political prisoner from an African state are left surrounded by armed forces when they're betrayed by their employers. (1978)
Sci-fi action with Rutger Hauer. In a future London, a detective seeks revenge on the serial killer who murdered his partner - but soon discovers that his target might not be human. (1992)
Airborne action with Kelsey Grammer. A professional thief who owes the mob a large sum of money is forced to rob a futuristic flying casino filled with the world's most dangerous criminals. (2020)
